title: Breakfast at the Hotel
content: Every morning during her vacation, Lily looked forward to breakfast at the hotel. The dining room offered fresh fruit, pastries, eggs, and many other choices. Guests from different countries filled the tables and discussed their plans for the day. Lily enjoyed sitting near the window while drinking coffee and watching the city wake up outside. Breakfast became a relaxing part of her daily routine. After eating, she usually reviewed a map and planned which attractions she wanted to visit next.
